tiles.title: Weekly
tiles.blurb: Worship, a message, and small groups that remember your name.

tiles.title: Camps
tiles.blurb: Four days off-grid. Worship nights, wild games, real conversations.

tiles.title: Retreats
tiles.blurb: Smaller circles, deeper questions. Sign up with a friend.

leaders.name: Rosa Delgado
leaders.oneLine: Runs girls' small groups. Teaches high school by day.

leaders.name: Tyrone Phillips
leaders.oneLine: Youth pastor. Former college football coach.

leaders.name: Citra Utami
leaders.oneLine: Solo youth pastor. Dancer. Reads too much.

parentFacts.title: Safety
parentFacts.body: Every leader is trained and background-checked. We enforce ratios and a two-leader-minimum rule.

parentFacts.title: Content
parentFacts.body: Teaching is age-appropriate, scripture-based, and theologically reviewed by the campus pastor.

parentFacts.title: Communication
parentFacts.body: You hear from us before and after every major event. Questions go to youth@futures.church.

parentFacts.title: Transport
parentFacts.body: For camps, we run chartered coaches with two drivers and a rolling head-count.
